creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 196987
v1

Hi there

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade KDE Frameworks to 5.50.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:
  https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/kf5-5.50.svn.v1.diff

* net/syndication is moved to net/kf5-syndication.
